{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Mora Belyard
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Mora Belyard]] is a second Under-lieutenant in the [[Imperial army]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“Second Under-lieutenant Mora Belyard, sir. Permission to come aboard?”<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
